data.title: Add multi-author support for Lab/Writing posts (20+ contributors)

data.body: BLOCKED on user: Julianna to provide 20+ authors and their attributions. Current posts are single-author — need multi-author support on posts.

Julianna sent partial list of posts to include (16 posts + external links). Saved to .lattice/notes/FRAC-172.md. More posts and author attributions still pending. Confirmed for FRAC-170: link to individual posts only, NOT full per-author Substack aggregates.
Julianna added 6 Teacher Spotlight posts with Substack URLs (2026-04-14). Appended to .lattice/notes/FRAC-172.md. Still pending: remaining posts, URLs for the first 16, and 20+ author attributions.

Julianna added 4 NYC-themed posts (2026-04-14): Daniel's 'New York City is Affordable' video (pt 1+2), Tyler's Guide, Hailey's interview with Elizabeth Barlow Rogers, and 'Social Fabric NYC' (author TBD). Appended to .lattice/notes/FRAC-172.md. URLs still needed.

MERGED WITH FRAC-174 (2026-04-14): one unified Writing content task. Scope: (a) ensure every post from Julianna's list exists in src/data/lab-documents.ts with correct title, URL, excerpt; (b) support multiple authors per post in the schema (change author: string -> authors: string[] or equivalent); (c) wire up 20+ contributors. Full post list in .lattice/notes/FRAC-172.md. Still blocked on URLs for the 16 canon posts + 4 NYC posts and author of 'Social Fabric NYC' + full list of 20+ contributors and which posts they attach to.
